assignments.name: Add_Additional_Archive_Values_to_AQ_Var
assignments.label: Add Additional Archive Values to AQ Var

assignments.name: Add_Additional_Values_to_AQ_Var
assignments.label: Add Additional Values to AQ Var

choices.name: chAA_AddorUpdate
choices.choiceText: Add, Modify, or Remove an Alternate Answer

choices.name: chAQ_AddorUpdate
choices.choiceText: Add, Modify, or Archive an Alternate Question

choices.name: chCatTag
choices.choiceText: Add or Remove Categories or Tags

choices.name: chModifyA
choices.choiceText: Modify the Primary Answer

value.stringValue: Welcome, Select Action, Add or Update, Finish
Step 1, Step 2, Step 3, Confirmation, Category, Tag, Alternate Answer, Alternate Question, Finish

Flow.description: Streamlined process to Create new Responses as well as adding alternative answers to existing response records.
Flow.label: Response Management

fields.name: AA_Add_Header_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Alternate Answers


Add an Alternate Answer to {!recordId.Name}

fields.name: AA_Title_Existing
fields.fieldText: Title

fields.name: Add_Another_AA_Existing
fields.fieldText: Add Another?

fields.name: Add_Cat_Text_2
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Add a Category


Select from the list below to add Categories to the response.

fields.name: Add_Tag_to_Existing_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Add Tags


Select from the list below to add Tags to the response.

fields.name: AQ_Archive_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Alternate Questions


Select the Alternate Question(s) that need to be Archived.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Modify_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Modify Primary Answer


Edit the current Answer for {!recordId.Name} below.

fields.name: Next_Review_Date
fields.fieldText: Next Review Date

fields.name: Modify_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Modify Primary Question


Change the current Question for {!recordId.Name} below.

fields.name: Question_Updated
fields.fieldText: Question

fields.name: Confirm_A_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Modify Primary Answer


Confirm Changes, if it looks good select Next or Previous to go back.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Compare_Values_Current
fields.fieldText:
Current Question Text:

{!varCurrentAnswerText}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Compare_Values_New
fields.fieldText:
New Question Text:

{!Primary_Answer_Updated.value}

fields.name: Copy_2_of_Modify_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Modify Primary Question


Confirm Changes, if it looks good select Next or Previous to go back.

fields.name: Compare_Values_Current
fields.fieldText:
Current Question Text:

{!varCurrentQuestionText}

fields.name: Compare_Values_New
fields.fieldText:
New Question Text:

{!Question_Updated}

fields.name: AQ_Header_Add_Existing
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Alternate Questions


Complete the field below to add a new Alternate Question for {!recordId.Name}.

fields.name: Alternate_Question_New_Existing
fields.fieldText: Alternate Question

fields.name: Add_Another_AQ_Existing
fields.fieldText: Add Another?

fields.name: Error_Text_New
fields.fieldText:
DOH! Something went wrong...


Here's some information about the error that could be helpful, but probably not.


﻿{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: WelcomeScreen_New
fields.fieldText:
﻿Avnio Response Management | Create New Response


Enter the primary question and answer in the fields below:

fields.name: Question_New
fields.fieldText: Question

fields.name: s2_Text_New
fields.fieldText:
﻿Avnio Response Management | Create New Response

﻿

Complete the required fields below for Business Unit(s) and Source. Add other details as needed.

fields.name: Key_Attributes_New
fields.fieldText: Key Attributes

fields.name: Source_New
fields.fieldText: Source

fields.name: Sales_Org_New
fields.fieldText: Business Unit(s)

fields.name: PS_Section_Name
fields.fieldText: PS Section Name

fields.name: Optional_Information
fields.fieldText: Optional Information

fields.name: Valid_From_New
fields.fieldText: Valid From

fields.name: Valid_To_New
fields.fieldText: Valid To

fields.name: Alert_Text_New
fields.fieldText: Alert Text

fields.name: Active_New
fields.fieldText: Active

fields.name: Visible_to_Assistant
fields.fieldText: Visible to Assistant

fields.name: S3_Text_New
fields.fieldText:
﻿Avnio Response Management | Create New Response


﻿Complete the required fields below to set up the response's review cycle and assign an owner and reviewer.

fields.name: Content_Review
fields.fieldText: Content Review

fields.name: Review_Cycle_New
fields.fieldText: Review Cycle

fields.name: Review_Cycle_Length_New
fields.fieldText: Review Cycle Length

fields.name: Next_Review_Date_New
fields.fieldText: Next Review Date

fields.name: Review_Status_New
fields.fieldText: Review Status

fields.name: S4_Text_New
fields.fieldText:
﻿Avnio Response Management | Create New Response


Review the information below. To make changes select No and then Next to return to the first screen. If the information is correct, select Yes and then Next to advance to the next screen.

fields.name: QA_Confirm
fields.fieldText:
Question:

{!Question_New}


Answer:

{!Answer_RT_New.value}

fields.name: Confirmation_Data_New
fields.fieldText:
Key Attributes:

Owner: {!Owner_New.recordName}


Status Category: {!Status_Category_Dependent.topValue}


Status: {!Status_Category_Dependent.middleValue}


Business Unit(s): {!Sales_Org_New}


Source: {!Source_New}


Content Review:

Review Cycle: {!Review_Cycle_New}


Review Cycle Length: {!Review_Cycle_Length_New}


Next Review Date: {!Next_Review_Date_New}


Reviewer: {!Reviewer_New.recordName}


Review Status: {!Review_Status_New}

fields.name: Additional_Details_Confirm
fields.fieldText:
Additional Details:

PS Section: {!PS_Section_Name}


Valid From: {!Valid_From_New}


Valid To: {!Valid_To_New}


Alert Text: {!Alert_Text_New}


Active: {!Active_New}


Visible to Assistant: {!Visible_to_Assistant}

fields.name: Confirmed
fields.fieldText: Confirm the information above?

fields.name: Confirm_Instructions
fields.fieldText:
Note: If you see anything incorrect above, select "No" to start over (The information you have already added will be retained for you to modify as needed).


Important: When you select "Yes" and click Next, your response record will be created.

fields.name: S5_Text_New
fields.fieldText:
﻿Avnio Response Management | Create New Response


{!Get_Created_Response_Record.Name} was created. Select from the list below to add Categories to the response.

fields.name: S6_Text_New
fields.fieldText:
﻿Avnio Response Management | Create New Response


Select from the list below to add Tags to the response.

fields.name: heaDER
fields.fieldText: ﻿Avnio Response Management | Create New Response

fields.name: Add_Alternate_Answer
fields.fieldText: Do you want to add an Alternate Answer?

fields.name: AA_Title
fields.fieldText: Title

fields.name: H2
fields.fieldText: ﻿Avnio Response Management | Create New Response

fields.name: Add_Alternate_Question
fields.fieldText: Do you want to add an Alternate Question?

fields.name: Alternate_Question_New
fields.fieldText: Alternate Question

fields.name: S9_Text_New
fields.fieldText:
﻿

Avnio Response Management | Create New Response


Click Finish to exit the response creation workflow and be redirected to the new record. Be sure to confirm all response details and fields are correct before publishing.

fields.name: AA_Opening_Text
fields.fieldText: Avnio Response Management | Alternate Answers

fields.name: Select_AA_Action
fields.fieldText: Add, Remove, or Modify?

fields.name: AA_Header_Text
fields.fieldText: Avnio Response Management | Alternate Questions

fields.name: Select_AQ_Action
fields.fieldText: Add, Modify, or Archive?

fields.name: CT_Welcome
fields.fieldText: Avnio Response Management | Categories & Tags

fields.name: Cat_or_Tag_Action
fields.fieldText: Select

fields.name: Wrong_Status
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management


Unfortunately, {!recordId.Name} is in a {!recordId.avnio__Status__c} status and cannot be modified at this time.


﻿Click Finish to close out. You can return to update this response after it has been published.

fields.name: AQ_Modify_Header_Existing
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Alternate Questions


Make your edits to {!Loop_Selected_AQ_to_Update.Name}.

fields.name: Alternate_Question_Update
fields.fieldText: Alternate Question

fields.name: Modify_S3_Text
fields.fieldText: Avnio Response Management | Modify Primary Answer

fields.name: Mod_Text_Done
fields.fieldText:
Your changes have been saved.


﻿Don't forget to publish!


This change will not be reflected in the Library until it has been published.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Modify_S3_Text
fields.fieldText: Avnio Response Management | Modify Primary Question

fields.name: Primary_Question_Done
fields.fieldText: Your changes have been saved.

fields.name: No_AA_Modify_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management


This response does not have any Alternate Answers to Modify.


Click Previous to select a different action, or Finish to close out.

fields.name: No_AA_Remove_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management


This response does not have any Alternate Answers to Remove.


Click Previous to select a different action, or Finish to close out.

fields.name: No_AQ_Archive_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management


This response does not have any Alternate Questions to Archive.


Click Previous to select a different action, or Finish to close out.

fields.name: No_AQ_Modify_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management


This response does not have any Alternate Questions to Modify.


Click Previous to select a different action, or Finish to close out.

fields.name: Nothing_Selected_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management


No selection was made, either use Previous to go back or Finish to close out.

fields.name: Nothing_Selected_Text_2
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management


No selection was made, either use Previous to go back or Finish to close out.

fields.name: Nothing_Selected_Text_3
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management


No selection was made, either use Previous to go back or Finish to close out.

fields.name: Nothing_Selected_Text_4
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management


No selection was made, either use Previous to go back or Finish to close out.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_AA_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Alternate Answers


Remove an Alternate Answer from {!recordId.Name}

fields.name: Remove_Tags_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Remove a Category


Select from the list below to remove Categories from the response.

fields.name: Remove_Tags_Text2
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Remove Tags


Select from the list below to remove Tags from the response.

fields.name: Warn
fields.fieldText:
You do not have access to complete this action.


﻿If you feel like you recieved this message in error, please contact your direct supervisor.

fields.name: AA_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Alternate Answers


Modify an Alternate Answer for {!recordId.Name}


Select all that you need to modify.

fields.name: AA_Final
fields.fieldText: Avnio Response Management | Alternate Answers

fields.name: AA_Final_Text
fields.fieldText: Your changes have been saved.

fields.name: AQ_Text
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Alternate Questions


Select the Alternate Question(s) for {!recordId.Name} that you would like to modify.

fields.name: S2_AQ_Header
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Alternate Questions


﻿Your changes have been saved.

fields.name: S2_AQ_Text
fields.fieldText:
Don't forget to publish!


Some changes will not be reflected in the Library until it has been published.

fields.name: CT_Text_S2
fields.fieldText: Avnio Response Management | Categories & Tags

fields.name: Cat_Add_Text
fields.fieldText: Selected Categories have been Added!

fields.name: Cat_Delete_Text
fields.fieldText: Selected Categories have been Removed!

fields.name: Tag_Add_Text
fields.fieldText: Selected Tags have been Added!

fields.name: Tag_Delete_Text
fields.fieldText: Selected Tags have been Removed!

fields.name: Update_Existing_S1_Header
fields.fieldText: Avnio Response Management

fields.name: Welcome
fields.fieldText: Select the action you would like to take on {!recordId.Name} below.

fields.name: What_are_you_needing_to_do
fields.fieldText: What would you like to do?

fields.name: AA_Update_S1
fields.fieldText:
Avnio Response Management | Alternate Answers


Make your edits to the existing Title and Answer for {!Loop_Selected_AA_to_Update.Name}.

fields.name: Updated_Title
fields.fieldText: Title
